description: Real border model: per-side width/style/color, dashed/dotted patterns, border-radius (bezier path), box-sizing: border-box, and per-side table cell rules (th/td border-bottom).
visual_assertions: The first card has rounded corners, a 2px blue border, and a light blue fill.
The second box has a dashed red border; the third only a dotted green top edge.
The fourth box shows a thick orange stripe on its left edge only.
The border-box card is narrower than a content-box one would be (250px outer).
Table header has a heavier dark bottom rule; body rows thin light gray rules; no full cell rectangles.
